name: io.github.loocor/mcpmate
title: MCPMate
description: A local MCP proxy that connects multiple MCP servers and AI clients, now packaged with the MCPBoard web console for a complete first-run management experience.

environmentVariables.name: MCPMATE_API_PORT
environmentVariables.description: REST API port exposed by the MCPMate management API.

environmentVariables.name: MCPMATE_DASHBOARD_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port used by the bundled MCPBoard web console.

environmentVariables.name: MCPMATE_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory used for MCPMate SQLite and REDB runtime state.

environmentVariables.name: MCPMATE_LOG
environmentVariables.description: Log level mapped to the mcpmate CLI log-level flag.

environmentVariables.name: MCPMATE_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode mapped to the mcpmate CLI transport flag.
